summary: Writes POP geometry to an Alembic (.abc) file. Supports multi-frame animation export, built-in plus custom point/primitive attributes, and packing multiple POPs into one .abc as separate Alembic objects.

key_params.name: record
key_params.note: Pulse to record current frame; hold-on records range

key_params.name: framestart
key_params.note: First frame of the recorded range

key_params.name: frameend
key_params.note: Last frame of the recorded range

key_params.name: objectname
key_params.note: Name of the Alembic object inside the file

key_params.name: exportcustomattribs
key_params.note: Include custom POP attributes in the export

common_gotchas: Alembic export is per-frame — make sure the timeline is actually advancing (or trigger a frame loop) while recording.
Large attribute sets balloon file size fast — only export the attributes downstream tools need.
Pair with Alembic In POP on import; both now share the new delayed-load workflow.
